title: Integrations
subtitle: Connect your self-hosted apps to centralize shopping, calendar and photos.

modal.encrypted: Credentials are AES-256 encrypted and stored on your server only.

presence.title: Passive monitoring (Home Assistant)
presence.intro: A door sensor, the coffee maker's smart plug or a motion detector are enough to reassure the circle: no camera, no wearable.
presence.webhookHelp: Called by a Home Assistant automation (rest_command) on every sign of life detected at your relative's home.

rule.title: Alert rule
rule.enable: Alert when there is no sign of life
rule.membersHint: With no selection, every admin and family member is alerted.

banner.late: No signal so far: the monitoring deadline has passed

homeassistant.description: Sync your shopping list with the Home Assistant list.

grocy.description: Sync your shopping list and stock from Grocy.

nextcloud.description: Import your Nextcloud calendar events into your appointments.

immich.description: Show random photos from your self-hosted Immich library as the kiosk display background.
immich.keyPlaceholder: From Immich > Account settings > API keys

whisper.name: Voice transcription (Whisper)
whisper.description: Transcribe journal voice notes with a self-hosted OpenAI-compatible Whisper service (speaches, faster-whisper-server).
whisper.keyPlaceholder: Bearer key if your service requires one
